narration: From a muddy village to an empire that shaped the world — in one minute.

narration: Founded in 753 BC, Rome began as a humble settlement by the Tiber River, steeped in myth.

narration: Legends say Romulus and Remus, raised by a she-wolf, fought for dominance — one would become king.

narration: Over centuries, Rome expanded, conquering lands from Gaul to Egypt, a beacon of power and culture.

narration: But, with great power came unrest; political chaos and invasions led to its downfall in 476 AD.
